name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_real_fire_exact_items_tile_audit_mcw
description: Exact-id fixture items (brazier, 2x4 fuel, charged lighter), normal deploy/drop/wielded-lighter action route, with live-accessible saved-player inventory preflight and same-run saved-map metadata gates after brazier deploy, fuel drop, and final fire checkpoint. No raw map fields are injected.

steps.label: exact_items_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The exact-items McWilliams fixture is loaded on the map before any deploy/drop/lighter macro runs.

steps.label: audit_saved_inventory_has_exact_fire_items
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player live-accessible carried/worn inventory contains the exact brazier, 2x4 fuel, and lighter fixture items before any GUI deploy/drop/lighter macro is trusted
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit any GUI deploy/drop/lighter step if the exact fixture items are missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory
steps.abort_reason: exact fire fixture items missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory before player-action deploy primitive audit

steps.label: open_wield_inventory_for_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wield inventory opens before filtering for the brazier.

steps.label: filter_wield_inventory_for_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wield inventory filter prompt is open for brazier selection.

steps.label: type_brazier_filter_for_wield
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wield inventory is filtered to brazier-related item(s).

steps.label: select_filtered_brazier_to_wield
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filtered brazier item is selected for wielding or the screen shows why selection did not leave the inventory context.
steps.failure_rule: if the following activation/deploy screens do not leave inventory context and saved metadata lacks f_brazier, this selector remains untrusted
steps.next_step_gate: do not treat the wielded activation as trusted unless this selector is screen- or metadata-corroborated

steps.label: activate_wielded_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wielded-item activation command is sent and should open the brazier deploy direction prompt if the previous selection succeeded.
steps.failure_rule: if this action does not produce a deploy prompt or f_brazier metadata, the wielded activation primitive remains untrusted
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit place_brazier_east unless deploy prompt/metadata is proven

steps.label: place_brazier_east
steps.expected_visible_fact: The brazier deploy direction is sent east and should return to the map with brazier furniture placed.
steps.failure_rule: if the following saved-map audit cannot see f_brazier east of the player, the direction/deploy primitive is red
steps.next_step_gate: the saved-map f_brazier audit is the required gate before any fuel/lighter/fire steps

steps.label: save_after_brazier_deploy
steps.expected_visible_fact: The game returns to the map after saving the immediate brazier-deploy checkpoint.
steps.preconditions: place_brazier_east should have deployed a brazier on the tile east of the player.
steps.failure_rule: if the following saved-map audit cannot see f_brazier east of the player, the deploy primitive is red and later fire steps must not count as feature proof

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains f_brazier furniture metadata after the deploy step
steps.preconditions: save_after_brazier_deploy wrote a same-run save immediately after the brazier placement action.
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit fuel/lighter/fire proof unless this deploy metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: brazier deploy metadata missing before fuel/lighter/fire steps

steps.label: step_onto_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The player steps east onto the proven brazier tile after the deploy metadata gate.

steps.label: drop_exact_2x4_on_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The exact 2x4 fuel drop route resolves on the current brazier tile.

steps.label: save_after_fuel_drop
steps.expected_visible_fact: The game returns to the map after saving the immediate fuel-drop checkpoint.
steps.preconditions: drop_exact_2x4_on_brazier should have dropped 2x4 fuel on the current brazier tile.
steps.failure_rule: if the following saved-map audit cannot see f_brazier and 2x4 on the player's current tile, the drop/fuel primitive is red and later fire steps must not count as feature proof

steps.label: audit_saved_current_tile_for_brazier_fuel
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved current tile contains f_brazier furniture and 2x4 fuel metadata after the drop step
steps.preconditions: save_after_fuel_drop wrote a same-run save while the player stands on the brazier/fuel tile.
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit lighter/fire proof unless this fuel metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: brazier/fuel metadata missing before lighter/fire steps

steps.label: step_west_clear_of_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The player steps west clear of the brazier/fuel tile before using the lighter.

steps.label: open_wield_inventory_for_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wield inventory opens before filtering for the lighter.

steps.label: filter_wield_inventory_for_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wield inventory filter prompt is open for lighter selection.

steps.label: type_lighter_filter_for_wield
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wield inventory is filtered to lighter-related item(s).

steps.label: select_filtered_lighter_to_wield
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filtered lighter item is selected for wielding or the screen shows why selection did not leave the inventory context.

steps.label: activate_wielded_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: The wielded lighter activation command is sent and should open the target prompt if the lighter was wielded.

steps.label: target_brazier_with_wielded_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: The lighter target flow is aimed at the brazier/fuel tile and submitted.

steps.label: advance_firestarter_activity_midpoint_only
steps.expected_visible_fact: A bounded number of turns advances the firestarter activity toward the midpoint checkpoint.

steps.label: save_after_midpoint_firestarter_activity
steps.expected_visible_fact: The game returns to the map after saving the firestarter midpoint checkpoint.

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_fd_fire
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains fd_fire metadata
steps.preconditions: previous step saved the game after the brazier/lighter activity route
steps.next_step_gate: feature proof cannot close unless this metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: fd_fire target metadata missing at final fire checkpoint

recommended_test_command: python3 tools/openclaw_harness/startup_harness.py probe bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_real_fire_exact_items_tile_audit_mcw (writes deploy/fuel/fd_fire metadata gates; missing required state aborts the remaining chain instead of becoming feature proof)
